news.title:
Delhi court takes notice of ED chargesheet against Robert Vadra in Haryana land deal.
Legal proceedings tied to DLF's Shikohpur land deal case to follow.
news.summary:
Delhi court takes notice of ED chargesheet against Robert Vadra in Haryana land deal.
Legal proceedings tied to DLF's Shikohpur land deal case to follow.

news.title:
Jefferies cuts target prices for DLF, Lodha, Oberoi, citing Middle East conflict's impact on sector growth.
DLF, Lodha, Godrej retain 'Buy' ratings; Prestige, Oberoi see cautious outlook due to pre-sales decline.
news.summary:
Jefferies cuts target prices for DLF, Lodha, Oberoi, citing Middle East conflict's impact on sector growth.
DLF, Lodha, Godrej retain 'Buy' ratings; Prestige, Oberoi see cautious outlook due to pre-sales decline.

news.title:
DLF Ltd. executed an NSE block trade of 501,390 shares at Rs. 561.8.
The total value of the trade amounted to approximately Rs. 28.2 crore.
news.summary:

news.title:
Nifty 50 and Sensex rebounded as US-Iran ceasefire led Nifty to rise 3.5% to 23,938 and Sensex 3.7% to 77,392.
Large-cap stocks like DLF, M&M, HDFC Life, LIC, Adani Ports, ICICI Bank show potential upside up to 63% amid valuation gaps.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 and Sensex rebounded as US-Iran ceasefire led Nifty to rise 3.5% to 23,938 and Sensex 3.7% to 77,392.
Large-cap stocks like DLF, M&M, HDFC Life, LIC, Adani Ports, ICICI Bank show potential upside up to 63% amid valuation gaps.

news.title:
Brokerages focus on Titan, DLF, Hindalco, and affordable housing NBFCs, flagging rural demand risks and margin compression.
Top picks include Bharti Airtel, Tata Steel, Home First Finance, and premium consumer plays like Titan and HUL.
news.summary:
Brokerages focus on Titan, DLF, Hindalco, and affordable housing NBFCs, flagging rural demand risks and margin compression.
Top picks include Bharti Airtel, Tata Steel, Home First Finance, and premium consumer plays like Titan and HUL.

news.title:
Top realty players may report mixed pre-sales in Q4 FY26 due to launch delays.
Softer demand sentiment amid macro uncertainty from West Asia war impacts performance.
news.summary:
Top realty players may report mixed pre-sales in Q4 FY26 due to launch delays.
Softer demand sentiment amid macro uncertainty from West Asia war impacts performance.

news.title:
Knight Frank reports Delhi's real estate market slowing with weaker activity.
Demand and deal velocity in the capital region appear to be softening.
news.summary:
Knight Frank reports Delhi's real estate market slowing with weaker activity.
Demand and deal velocity in the capital region appear to be softening.

news.title:
DLF completes ₹710.2 Cr deal with Srijan Realty, transferring DLF Techpark II SEZ asset.
The deal also includes the sale of a 17.75-acre land parcel in Kolkata.
news.summary:
DLF completes ₹710.2 Cr deal with Srijan Realty, transferring DLF Techpark II SEZ asset.
The deal also includes the sale of a 17.75-acre land parcel in Kolkata.

news.title:
DLF sold its Kolkata IT-SEZ and 18 acres land for Rs 710 cr to Srijan Group.
The deal includes DLF TechPark II transfer; DLF focuses on monetising commercial assets.
news.summary:
DLF sold its Kolkata IT-SEZ and 18 acres land for Rs 710 cr to Srijan Group.
The deal includes DLF TechPark II transfer; DLF focuses on monetising commercial assets.

news.title:
Adani Ent, LIC, DLF, HDFC Bank, and Tata Group stocks hit 52-week lows amidst market downturn.
Geopolitical tensions, rising crude prices, and RBI measures create challenging equity market backdrop.
news.summary:

news.title:
Nifty Realty surges 4% as oil prices ease; Phoenix Mills, DLF gain up to 5%.
Sector hit 15% recently; analysts cautious due to inflation, rate sensitivity.
news.summary:

news.title:
JPMorgan rates DLF Overweight with a target price of Rs 800, citing a 38% stock drop.
DLF's Rs 600bn launch pipeline, 137msf land bank, and zero gross debt drive positive outlook.
news.summary:
JPMorgan rates DLF Overweight with a target price of Rs 800, citing a 38% stock drop.
DLF's Rs 600bn launch pipeline, 137msf land bank, and zero gross debt drive positive outlook.

news.title:
Real estate stocks like Godrej Properties, DLF, and Sobha fall 3-4% amid US-Iran war impact.
Sector faces tile supply issues due to gas shortages; Realty index down 10% in March, led by Lodha's 16% drop.
news.summary:
Real estate stocks like Godrej Properties, DLF, and Sobha fall 3-4% amid US-Iran war impact.
Sector faces tile supply issues due to gas shortages; Realty index down 10% in March, led by Lodha's 16% drop.

news.title:

The stock outperformed the Realty sector and Sensex after a 4-day decline.
